prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17416名、2026年大幅扩招28.1%（ 位次下移约2935名）、全省物理类考生增长19.7%（竞争加剧推高位次）以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度偏高等因素，经，预测2026 年最低位次约20501名，区间20001–21001名。扩招是位次后移的主导因素，考生规模增长部分抵消了扩招的位次下移效应。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 11014 → 15362 → 10601 → 11467 → 17416, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 17416, which is about 5949 places lower than 2024, with significant fluctuation. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi was 78 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 80 in 2024, and 89 in 2025. In 2026, the plan sharply increases to 114, an expansion of about 28.1% compared to 2025, exerting considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026 is 60 → 60 → 61 → 65 → 64 → 63, remaining stable in the 60–65 range, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. In 2026, no significant negative signals were detected in reputation data. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 52 (relatively hot), with a comprehensive heat index of 625630, indicating moderate to high short video exposure and a certain level of application interest. No records of enrollment gaps were found. Its top disciplines include Hydraulic Engineering (A+, nationally top), Civil Engineering (A), and Environmental Science and Engineering (A), which are highly correlated with its enrollment majors and strongly attract applicants to related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, and Hohai University offers enrollment in these areas. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying provincial competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an economically developed coastal region in eastern China, which holds some regional appeal for Shaanxi examinees. Its enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9%–1.4%, indicating it is not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17416, the significant 28.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which lowers rankings by about 2935 places), the 19.7% increase in provincial physics category examinees (which raises rankings due to intensified competition), stable university reputation, and high major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 20501, with a range of 20001–21001. The enrollment expansion is the dominant factor causing the ranking to drop, while the increase in examinee numbers partially offsets this downward effect.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (above 20001), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors (Computer Science Dayu Class, Electrical Engineering, Water Resources Dayu Class). If the ranking is near the upper bound (around 21001), prioritize Tier 2 and safety Tier 3 majors. Hohai University's A+ Hydraulic Engineering discipline offers outstanding strength, and related majors provide stable employment prospects, making them worthy of special attention.
